situation: Recently transitioned from employment to freelance. Applied to Barmer for continued statutory coverage. As a newly self-employed person with no completed fiscal year, had no prior income documentation to submit. Barmer's standard process requires prior-year income documentation.
rejection_reason: Could not provide an Einkommensteuerbescheid or Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung as the freelance activity had just started. Barmer put the application on hold requiring documentation that did not yet exist.
what_worked: Submitted a Selbstauskunft (self-declaration) stating expected annual income for the current year, supported by signed freelance contracts showing upcoming project fees. Barmer accepted this as a basis for provisional contributions with annual reconciliation after tax filing.
what_failed: Submitting just the Gewerbe- or Freiberufleranmeldung form. Offering a bank statement showing personal savings. Requesting the minimum contribution rate without income documentation.
